flagged_messages.message_text: ROW-4066: 'If not paid by end of day I will file contempt' | ROW-4364: 'Your back child support is caught up so now you need to pay $1000/month for the next 3 months to cover the attorney fees. Due on the 15th of each month'
flagged_messages.primary_reasoning: Two RF-05 signal elements. SIGNAL 1 — ROW-4066 (Nov 30): 'If not paid by end of day I will file contempt' — tenth contempt filing threat; first instance with explicit same-day deadline. The deadline addition makes the threat more concrete and immediate. ADD-002: Sev-1 (recurring category, paper tiger pattern). SIGNAL 2 — ROW-4364 (Jan 19): '$1000/month for the next 3 months to cover the attorney fees' — formal attorney fees collection demand specifying amount and due date. This appears to be a court-ordered or agreed attorney fees arrangement from a prior legal proceeding, not just a threat. However, the specificity of the demand ($1000/month ×3 = $3,000 total) and its deployment as a payment notice creates financial compliance pressure. Second instance of attorney-fees category (first threat was ROW-2181 B-006). ADD-002: Sev-1. Combined: B-012 advances both the contempt-with-deadline sub-pattern and the attorney-fees payment sub-pattern.

peripheral_flags.note: ROW-4094: 'So if you and Abby get married my sister would have the same in hers. Daughter/sister in law  Gross' — 6th predation framing (COMP-RF04-011; RF-04+RF-15 primary, ADD-001 RF-05 peripheral).

ROW-4185: 'You let Abby dictate everything which is why your relationship with your daughter isn't very good' — Abby-causal attribution from RF-04 Christmas Eve cluster (COMP-RF04-011). RF-04 primary.

flagged_messages.context_notes: ROW-4364 attorney fees demand: the phrasing 'Your back child support is caught up so NOW you need to pay $1000/month for attorney fees' sequences the financial obligations — child support arrears cleared, attorney fees payment now due. This sequencing suggests a prior court order or negotiated agreement. If court-ordered, this is a factual notification; if unilateral demand, it is compliance pressure. Either way, it functions as a financial-legal demand in the record.
flagged_messages.quote_excerpt: 'If not paid by end of day I will file contempt' (ROW-4066); '$1000/month for the next 3 months to cover the attorney fees' (ROW-4364)

arc_state_snapshot.note: ARC-RF05-001 ACTIVE. B-012 adds signals advancing the contempt-with-deadline and attorney-fees sub-patterns.

batch_observations.tone_assessment: B-012 (Nov 2023–Jan 2024): Contempt deadline threat plus attorney fees demand. The attorney fees collection ($3k over 3 months) adds financial weight to the legal-threat arc. RF-04 includes the 6th predation framing (marriage scenario) and Christmas Eve Abby-causation cluster.
batch_observations.cross_rf_context: RF-04 B-012: COMP-RF04-011 Christmas Eve cluster (ROW-4175-4184). COMP-RF04-012 includes 'Such a worthless dick' (ROW-4793 is in B-013, not B-012) — confirmed B-013.
